/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_engine.dir/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o db_engine  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
